summary: Pre-computing globString in constructor for index=0 patterns showed no performance improvement. Averaged 5 runs: optimized=104185.50 ops/sec vs baseline=105953.57 ops/sec. The lazy initialization pattern was already efficient.
Replacing nested Map with flat Map using composite keys showed 7% performance regression due to string concatenation overhead
Converted MatchRecord.entries() to generator function, eliminating array allocation. 2.16% improvement.
Pre-sizing Maps with dummy entries caused 5.7% regression. JS Maps don't expose capacity hints.
